name: Zhejiang Wanfeng Auto Wheel Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Wanfeng Auto Wheel Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells aluminum alloy wheels for the automotive industry in China. The company also exports its products to Europe, the United States, Asia, and other countries and regions. Zhejiang Wanfeng Auto Wheel Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Xinchang, China.
